self-improving-skills.note: Local skill-manager MCP for Codex self-improvement. Provides safe skill list/view/create/patch/write/archive/curate/backup/rollback/scan tools, background-review queue status, usage telemetry, write-root enforcement, and a read-before-write guard. The server derives the official writable data directory from the installed plugin cache when PLUGIN_DATA is unavailable, so hooks, workers, and MCP share one store.
